titleStmt.title: SII 26.444: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 444. (A.R. No. 423 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the bottom and hence a few details of the gift are not avilable.

It records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍū, by a certain Śemmāṟuḍaiyān Śōḻan Vichchādiran of Śemmāṟu in Ēmappeṟṟūr-nāḍu in Tirumuṉaippāḍi in Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It appears that he endowed some money in respect of this, which was accepted by two Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple, named Bhāradvāja Puliyan Śivabattaṉ alias Nāṉūṟṟuva bhaṭṭaṉ and Bhāradvāja Marundu Poṟkōyil-nambi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkirama coḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu malāṭāṉa jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavade
varkku kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭi Emappeṟṟūrnāṭṭuc cemmāṟṟuc cemmāṟuṭaiyān coḻan viccātiran vaitta santi viḷakku 1 Onṟukkum Ikkoyil civabrāhmaṇana bhāradvāja puliyan civapattaṉāṉa nāṉūṟṟuva bhaṭṭa[ ṉum bh] Āradvāja maruntu poṟkoyil nampiyum IvviruContinuation built in.
Digital edition of SII 26.444 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
